name: L3 — Tide Empress Trickle
flavor: Six healers, one tide. The math takes care of the rest.
description: Mono-WATER / mono-TIDAL recovery shell centered on tide_empress. The L3 mutation makes every heal anywhere on the team trickle +1 HP to every other alive ally (charter §22.2 L3), so a single coral_priest tap effectively heals the entire team. With five other dedicated healers (coral_augur epic, coral_priest, tide_chanter, tidewatcher, abyssbreaker uncommons), every round generates a flood of trickle events — the team is functionally HP-positive against most damage profiles.
